title: noaea spinosissima
intro: Noaea spinosissima, also known as the spiny Noaea or spinous Noaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the Middle East, particularly in the deserts of Israel and Jordan. The medicinal properties of Noaea spinosissima lie in its ability to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Noaea spinosissima is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to provide health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of coughs and colds.
